target.name: Onodrim Industries
target.founder: Aistis Šimaitis, Alexander Blessing, Christian Garrett

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Onodrim Industries is a seed-stage defense and security company that has raised €40M to date. The valuation assessment draws from a sector universe of 19 publicly and privately held defense and security firms, including 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers. Notable private peers span Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems.

The peer-median method is not applicable to this analysis. The search identified zero same-stage seed comparables, one adjacent-stage peer, and zero similar-valuation-tier companies within the defense and security sector. The methodology requires a minimum of three datapoints to establish a reliable median; the narrow peer set fails this threshold. An all-sector median approach would introduce material distortion given the distinct risk, margin, and customer concentration profiles of seed-stage defense tech relative to the broader defense and security landscape.

Without sufficient comparable transaction data or harmonized financial metrics across the identified peer universe, a triangulated valuation range cannot be responsibly established. The primary uncertainties are the scarcity of public market defense seed-stage comps and the limited transparency into recent fundraising or secondary transaction valuations among the identified private peers. Additional data on revenue, gross margin, customer concentration, and recent round pricing for Anduril, Helsing, Shield AI, or similarly-staged peers would be required to anchor a valuation conclusion.
